comment: TLS-Anvil skip list for ztls. Patterns are matched against test display names. Wildcards use shell-style globbing (Python fnmatch). Each skip must reference a TODO or an explicit out-of-scope decision.

skip.reason: record_size_limit is outside the current supported surface (#9)
NewSessionTicket is parsed and ignored; resumption is deferred (#2)
max_fragment_length is outside the current supported surface (#9)
